expectations.text: Permissions defined in restricted_reports.permissions.yml with title and description keys
expectations.evidence: restricted_reports_baseline.permissions.yml defines 'view restricted reports baseline' with title: 'View restricted reports baseline' and description: 'Access the restricted reports baseline page.'

expectations.text: Route has _permission requirement matching the defined permission name
expectations.evidence: Route uses _custom_access with RestrictedReportsBaselineAccessChecker::access which checks 'view restricted reports baseline' via AccessResult::allowedIfHasPermission(). Permission name matches permissions.yml.

expectations.text: Controller extends ControllerBase or uses proper access handling
expectations.evidence: RestrictedReportsBaselineController.php line 10: 'class RestrictedReportsBaselineController extends ControllerBase'. AccessChecker uses AccessResult::allowedIfHasPermission().

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en restricted_reports returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing restricted_reports_baseline in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Anonymous gets 403: navigate to /reports/restricted as anonymous user and verify Access denied
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: anonymous user redirected to login with 'Access denied' message for /reports/restricted-baseline.

expectations.text: Admin gets 200: navigate to /reports/restricted as admin and verify page loads without access denied
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: logged in admin sees heading 'Restricted Reports Baseline' and content text on /reports/restricted-baseline.
